comparisons.evidence: integrated_kcfi_validation.json has eight stock callback matches

comparisons.difference: The reconstructed write path rejects invalid count and capacity, protects removed devices and holds an SPI reference.
The reconstructed ioctl rejects nonpositive carrier and values above the DTS-derived maximum.
The reconstructed driver maintains users and defers freeing a removed runtime until the final release.
The reconstructed module has a separate module name and requires controlled bind, node and rollback validation.

blockers: No controlled hardware session has proven the hardening deltas preserve the required user-visible behavior.
No independent reviewer has approved the parity rationale.
